name: Steamed Brown Bread^
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Beat the egg, then add milk and incorporate into the flour mixture.
3. Add raisins and molasses.
4. Grease tins well with tightly fitting lids prepared.
5. Steam for 3 hours. The loaves may be placed in the oven for a few minutes after steaming if a dry crust is desired.
(Note: Many recipes in this collection did not include amounts or oven temperatures. This recipe has been typed as it appears in the book, including any typos.)
